privileged_info_summary: The task uses real satellite TLE data from CelesTrak. It was verified through web search and checking the local weather.txt data that the 4 injected satellites (37849: SUOMI NPP, 32958: FENGYUN 3A, 37214: FENGYUN 3B, 35951: DMSP 5D-3 F18) are indeed real-world weather satellites. The coordinates for Fairbanks, AK provided in the prompt (64.8378 N, 147.7164 W, 133m) were also verified as physically accurate via web search.
